commands: set -- submissions/*Basics_Day11*.ipynb; if [ "$1" = 'submissions/*Basics_Day11*.ipynb' ]; then echo 'ERROR: No matching Day 11 notebook found'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo 'ERROR: Multiple matching Day 11 notebooks found'; exit 1; fi; jupyter nbconvert --to script "$1" --output basics_day11 --output-dir .
if [ ! -f basics_day11.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Notebook conversion failed - basics_day11.py not found'; exit 1; fi
